CREATE TABLE test_round (value FLOAT, decimals INT);
SELECT value, round(value, decimals) FROM test_round;
SELECT round(value, 2) AS rounded_value FROM test_round WHERE value > 0;
SELECT round(subquery.value, subquery.decimals) FROM (SELECT value, decimals FROM test_round WHERE value <= 50) AS subquery;
SELECT round(a.value, 2) FROM test_round a JOIN test_round b ON a.value > b.value WHERE b.decimals = 2;
SELECT MAX(round(value, 1)) FROM test_round WHERE decimals = 1;
CREATE TABLE round_results AS SELECT value, round(value, decimals) AS rounded FROM test_round;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM round_results WHERE rounded IS NOT NULL;
SELECT round(AVG(value), 2) FROM test_round GROUP BY decimals;
